title: [perf] True block-TSQR tree/replay tall SVD route after QR-first reject
description: Follow-up from frankenscipy-8l8r1.54. Sequential QR-first tall SVD preserved behavior but failed remote RCH score gate on vmi1156319: lstsq 135.930455 ms -> 165.088561 ms (0.823379x), pinv 147.313174 ms -> 287.796269 ms (0.511866x); source restored to zero fsci-linalg diff. Next primitive must be fundamentally different from sequential QR: implement true communication-avoiding TSQR with block-local Householder QR, fixed left-to-right stacked-R tree reduction, and reverse tree replay to form U = Q * U_R under the existing public reconstruction/rank/tie/sign guards. Required: fresh RCH baseline first, one lever only, public golden SHA unchanged (1cdd3658c6caef8dec9fc58fa7e12b8d5c90151e2f93df91ffe2fcf862c16225), no unsafe/C BLAS/MKL/XLA/thread fanout, keep only Score >= 2.0 with remote same-worker evidence.

dependencies.title: [perf][no-gaps] Close ALL vs-upstream perf gaps in pure safe Rust — no C BLAS/LAPACK/XLA linkage
